title: stelis alba
intro: Stelis alba, also known as the white stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis alba include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
